prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical smartphone portrait of a young woman sitting courtside in a packed NBA arena during a Chicago Bulls game, waist-up close framing from the front. She wears an oversized red Chicago Bulls hoodie with large black-and-white “BULLS” lettering and a bull head logo on the chest, loose sleeves, and one hand in the front pocket. Her layered wavy wolf cut dark brown hair falls around her shoulders, slightly messy and textured. Her face is intentionally hidden by a centered plain medium-brown rectangular privacy block covering the facial features. She holds one clear plastic cup of amber beer in her left hand, with a black-and-red Chicago Bulls logo printed on the cup. The background is a sharp, detailed basketball stadium with a crowded audience, courtside seats, the court and hoop visible on the right, a digital shot clock showing 24, and red LED ribbon boards around the arena displaying Bulls branding; include exactly three prominent horizontal LED ribbon bands. Use realistic arena lighting, natural phone-camera perspective, detailed clothing fabric, shallow-to-moderate depth of field, no glamour retouching, no extra people in the foreground blocking the subject, and no watermark.
